children.name:
System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.WebDriverTimeoutException : Timed out after 30 seconds
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.NoSuchElementException : no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//*[contains(text(),'Редактировать')]"}
  (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.45); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception

System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.WebDriverTimeoutException : Timed out after 30 seconds
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.NoSuchElementException : no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":".date [type='text']"}
  (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.45); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception
Успешное сохранение, если обе даты корректно заполнены

System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.WebDriverTimeoutException : Timed out after 30 seconds
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.NoSuchElementException : no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//span[contains(text(),'Добавить материалы')]"}
  (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.45); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception
Можно загрузить материал типа Файл с компьютера в активность

System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.WebDriverTimeoutException : Timed out after 30 seconds
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.NoSuchElementException : no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//input[contains(@aria-label,'Максимальный балл')]"}
  (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.45); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception
Проверка установки Максимального порога баллов в активности Кода будущего
Можно добавить материал типа Тест-тренажёр из Библиотеки в шаблон контрольной

{"httpStatusCode":400,"errors":[{"key":"","value":"The database operation was expected to affect 1 row(s), but actually affected 0 row(s); data may have been modified or deleted since entities were loaded. See https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=527962 for information on understanding and handling optimistic concurrency exceptions."}],"isSuccess":false}
Assert.That(actual, Is.EqualTo(expected))
  Expected: 200
  But was:  400

Переключение чекбокса не сработало.
Assert.That(condition, Is.True)
  Expected: True
  But was:  False
Можно отметить/снять галку с чекбокса Отображать студентам подробную информацию о результатах
